testcase.name: test_open_shift_returns_400_for_same_name
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_shift_guard_and_close.py:149: in test_open_shift_returns_400_for_same_name assert r2.status_code == 400, f"expected 400 got {r2.status_code}: {r2.text}" E AssertionError: expected 400 got 200: {"id":"64469f77-947b-4c4f-bfcd-1cf8ec5acbaa","cashier_id":"qa-guard-a3f81270","cashier_name":"كاشير 400 QA","branch_id":"76f56acc-6948-4a2f-bbf4-feccbddea88f","opening_cash":0.0,"closing_cash":null,"expected_cash":0.0,"cash_difference":null,"total_sales":0.0,"total_cost":0.0,"gross_profit":0.0,"total_orders":0,"started_at":"2026-07-02T22:20:44.624404+00:00","card_sales":0.0,"cash_sales":0.0,"credit_sales":0.0,"delivery_app_sales":{},"driver_sales":0.0,"total_expenses":0.0,"net_profit":0.0,"ended_at":null,"status":"open","denominations":null,"cancelled_orders":0,"cancelled_amount":0.0,"discounts_total":0.0,"business_date":"2026-07-03","received_at":null,"received_by":null,"received_amount":null,"received_external_expenses":null,"received_net_deposit":null} E assert 200 == 400 E + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code
